001import java.util.Stack;
002
003/**
004 * Stores the state that belongs to the player: identity, current position, history,
005 * and a personal item list.
006 *
007 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
008 * @version 2026.04.13
009 */
010public class Player
011{
012    /** Player display name (may be {@code null}). */
013    private String aName;
014    /** Current room occupied by the player. */
015    private Room aCurrentRoom;
016    /** Stack of previously visited rooms, used to support {@code back}. */
017    private Stack<Room> aPreviousRooms;
018    /** Items currently held by the player, keyed by a short lookup name. */
019    private ItemList aItems;
020
021    /**
022     * Creates a player with a name and a starting room.
023     *
024     * @param pName      the player name (can be empty or {@code null})
025     * @param pStartRoom the initial room
026     */
027    public Player( final String pName, final Room pStartRoom )
028    {
029        this.aName = pName;
030        this.aCurrentRoom = pStartRoom;
031        this.aPreviousRooms = new Stack<Room>();
032        this.aItems = new ItemList();
033    }
034
035    /**
036     * Returns the player's current room.
037     *
038     * @return the current room (may be {@code null} if not initialized)
039     */
040    public Room getCurrentRoom()
041    {
042        return this.aCurrentRoom;
043    }
044
045    /**
046     * Changes the current room, saving the previous one to the history stack.
047     * <p>
048     * Intended to be called by the engine after validating the intended direction.
049     * </p>
050     *
051     * @param pNextRoom the room to move to (may be {@code null})
052     */
053    public void moveTo( final Room pNextRoom )
054    {
055        if ( this.aCurrentRoom != null ) {
056            this.aPreviousRooms.push( this.aCurrentRoom );
057        }
058        this.aCurrentRoom = pNextRoom;
059    }
060
061    /**
062     * Indicates whether the player can go back to a previous room.
063     *
064     * @return {@code true} if a previous room exists in the history stack
065     */
066    public boolean canGoBack()
067    {
068        return ! this.aPreviousRooms.isEmpty();
069    }
070
071    /**
072     * Moves back to the previous room.
073     * <p>
074     * This method assumes {@link #canGoBack()} is {@code true}. If the stack is empty,
075     * {@link Stack#pop()} will throw an exception.
076     * </p>
077     */
078    public void goBack()
079    {
080        this.aCurrentRoom = this.aPreviousRooms.pop();
081    }
082
083    /**
084     * Returns the player name.
085     *
086     * @return the current name (may be {@code null})
087     */
088    public String getName()
089    {
090        return this.aName;
091    }
092    
093    /**
094     * Sets the player name.
095     *
096     * @param pName the new name (may be {@code null})
097     */
098    public void setName( final String pName )
099    {
100        this.aName = pName;
101    }
102
103    /**
104     * Retrieves an item from the player's inventory.
105     *
106     * @param pName lookup key used when the item was added
107     * @return the matching {@link Item}, or {@code null}
108     */
109    public Item getItem( final String pName )
110    {
111        return this.aItems.getItem( pName );
112    }
113
114    /**
115     * Adds (or replaces) an item in the player's inventory.
116     *
117     * @param pName lookup key used for later retrieval
118     * @param pItem the item to store
119     */
120    public void addItem( final String pName, final Item pItem )
121    {
122        this.aItems.addItem( pName, pItem );
123    }
124
125    /**
126     * Removes an item from the player's inventory.
127     *
128     * @param pName lookup key of the item to remove
129     */
130    public void removeItem( final String pName )
131    {
132        this.aItems.removeItem( pName );
133    }
134
135} // Player
